title: Short Shield
body:
Short Shield is a simple tweaking texture pack that shortens the vanilla shield, giving you much better on-screen visibility without changing gameplay balance. Perfect for PvP, survival, and anyone who wants a cleaner view while still staying protected.

### Features

* Shorter shield model
* More visibility while blocking
* Vanilla-friendly appearance
* Works great with PvP and performance packs

Download Short Shield today and enjoy a clearer, safer Minecraft experience.
